items.example: How long have you been a member of this gym?
I've been a vegetarian for almost ten years.
I've been going to this gym since last summer.

items.translation: Я никогда не чувствовал себя лучше
items.example: Since I started running, I've never felt better.

items.phrase: I'm trying to get into shape
items.translation: Я пытаюсь привести себя в форму
items.example: I'm trying to get into shape before my holiday.

items.phrase: I need to cut down on…
items.example: I need to cut down on sugar and processed food.
I've taken up yoga to improve my flexibility.

items.phrase: How often do you work out?
items.example: A: How often do you work out? B: I go to the gym four times a week.
